overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a yellow hat and illuminated outfit walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses open plazas, covered alleys with graffiti, interacts with a vending machine, and continues through bustling pedestrian streets with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the neon-lit buildings ahead, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying figures on the left side of the walkway
tall building covered in pink and purple neon lighting with multiple windows
tall futuristic skyscraper with glass exterior visible in the distance
metal railing along the right edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open pedestrian plaza at night, surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings. A large digital billboard glows on the left while pink neon lights illuminate the right side. The camera follows smoothly from behind as sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

events.description: enters covered alleyway with graffiti-covered walls from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage with graffiti on the walls, approaching the exit light ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera through the alley

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the alleyway
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
glowing red rectangular sign mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow covered alley with graffiti-covered walls and dim artificial lighting. A red neon sign glows on the left wall as the character walks toward the bright exit at the far end. Other pedestrians occasionally pass through the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine area under overpass structure

events.description: character stops at vending machine to interact with it
character resumes walking after completing vending machine interaction

agents.ego_description: approaches the vending machine, stops to use it while another NPC stands nearby, then continues walking

notable_agents.action: NPC standing at the vending machine using it when the character arrives

entered.detail: illuminated blue vending machine with colorful product display
elevated walkway or bridge passing overhead with railings
passage ahead illuminated with intense red lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark alley, the character approaches a blue vending machine under an overhead bridge structure. The character stops to interact with the machine while bathed in mixed neon and red lighting from the corridor ahead. After a brief interaction, the character continues walking past the machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with seated individuals

events.description: enters darker corridor with people sitting against walls on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor passing seated individuals resting against the walls

entered.detail: tall dark concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage
bright neon lights visible at the far end of the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow service corridor with high concrete walls. Several individuals are seated on the ground against the right wall. The passage is dimly lit except for the bright neon glow visible at the far exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial pedestrian street with massive digital advertising

events.description: exits dark corridor into open neon-lit commercial street with large billboards

agents.ego_description: walking down the bustling pedestrian street toward massive illuminated billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the character

entered.detail: giant illuminated advertising screen dominating the view ahead
yellow-lit escalator or stairway structure on the right side
elevated walkway crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial pedestrian street bathed in neon light. Massive digital billboards tower ahead while a yellow escalator structure glows on the right. The crowd density increases as the character walks toward the illuminated city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city at night, transitioning from wide neon plazas through claustrophobic corridors and finally into a vibrant commercial district. It begins by following the character through an open pedestrian plaza flanked by towering digital billboards and pink neon lights. As the character moves forward, the open space narrows into a dim, graffiti-covered alley with a glowing red sign before opening slightly under a bridge where the character pauses at a blue vending machine. The scene then shifts into a dark, concrete service corridor where figures sit against the walls, creating a sense of confinement that builds toward a bright exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a bustling pedestrian street, where the environment expands into a sea of massive digital displays and glowing yellow escalators.
